orga 2025-10-24 7:28 PM
  • Reverted this as there needs to be a later solution due to its highlight

  • Blood Hunt default cost increased from 100 > 150
  • Blood Hunt cost scaling increased from 25 > 50 for every use
  • Sprint speed increased from 26.75 > 27

  • Eviscerate onhit speed boost duration toned down from 1.5s > 1.25s

nrutas 2025-10-27 9:30 AM
  • Mini Classic Battlegrounds update:
    • now has a 3 way killer only teleport grate for the elevated portion of the map. accessible through the red river grate from the spectre influence
    • opened up more of the river fences to allow better traversal
    • removed some ramps and replaced them with one way drop offs. the towers top floor is no longer accessible
    • new statue POI and additional props
    • reduced size of alleyway
 (edited)

Deleted User 2025-10-28 6:38 PM
  • Veeronica
    • Phase Speed Boost 1s -> 2s (in and out of zone)
    • Sprays can now be individually used to start a Sk8. When started this way, Vandalism will go on cooldown and Sk8 will be nerfed significantly. (Trick gives 5 stamina, and stamina drain is much faster. Also the music won't play )
    • Bumper has a global 10s cooldown for all Vees (knockback reduced by 95%)
    • Graffitis have a yellow beam if not completed, and have a progress bar
    • The Cat (Guest 666)
    • Blood Orbs all DIE when she activates Blood Hunt, and can't spawn while in Blood Hunt
    • Blood Hunt's duration gets set to 7 seconds immediately when LMS starts, and cannot be activated in LMS
    • Blood Hunt timer on kill 20s -> 15s
    • Eviscerate puts M1 on a 1.5 second cooldown
    • Eviscerate no longer resets its full cooldown in Blood Hunt
    • Blood Hunt's stun immunity applies Helpless for 2 seconds
    • Only one reward can be given per Infernal Cry
    • Killing a Survivor in Blood Hunt no longer gives extra rewards
    • Infernal Cry's sound can be heard from across the map

CEO of Isaac 2025-11-05 2:52 PM
  • Revamped IsaacChance
Lyth 2025-11-05 4:22 PM
---------------------------- 007n7 -------------------------------- Clone:
  • Invisibility & undetectable buff duration increased from 4s -> 4.5s
  • Clone takes hitbox priority when its health is greater than or equal to survivor health, and gets negative priority when less ---------------------------- Guest 1337 -------------------------------- Block:
  • Hitbox priority goes up to 3 (from 2 baseline) when blocking, falls back down to 2 after ---------------------------- Veeronica -------------------------------- Vandalism:
  • Graffiti HP nerfed to 5 HP
  • Destroying a graffiti will now destroy graffitis within 4.5 studs and all adjacent graffitis SK8:
  • Phase no longer stacks with the onhit speed boost
  • Phase speed boost duration decreased from 2s > 1.5s
  • Trick speed boost decreased from 1.5x > 1.42x
  • Mobile increased turn control effect duration increased from 1s > 2s upon landing
  • Remove Mobile increased crash damage penalty Activate Battery:
  • Activate Battery cooldown increased from 55s > 75s
  • Starting Battery reduced from 50% > 30% ---------------------------- c00lkidd -------------------------------- Walkspeed Override:
  • Base damage increased from 30 > 32
  • On hit, now gives stun immunity for the slash animation and for a lingering 1.5s after you are able to move again
  • Ending lag on crash and miss reduced by 15% Pizza Delivery:
  • If the nearest survivor is not within 70 studs, the clones will now travel at 19.5 walkspeed (relative to 14 regularly) before going back to usual speed upon getting close ---------------------------- Sixer --------------------------------------- Bloodhound:
  • Blood Orbs now have a maximum lifetime of 60s
  • Hemorrhage duration reduced from 30m > 90s
  • You can no longer gain blood from players affected by Slateskin
  • You can no longer apply hemorrhage to players affected by Slateskin (but slateskin will not cleanse existing hemorrhage status) Eviscerate:
  • Eviscerate now applies slowness 1 for 2s after use if it does not land a hit Infernal Cry:
  • Infernal Cry hitbox size reduced by 25%
  • Infernal Cry now makes you temporarily transparent during the cast similar to Demonic Pursuit Blood Hunt:
  • Blood Hunt infernal cry hitbox size penalty reduced from 20% > 10% ---------------------------- Slasher -------------------------------- Gashing Wound:
  • On hit, now gives stun immunity for the animation and for a lingering 1.5s after you are able to move again Raging Pace:
  • Speed decreased from 19.5 > 19

voxov 2025-12-15 7:54 AM
  • Made it so Bloxy Cola applies on Speed 1 when used during LMS
voxov 2025-12-15 8:48 AM
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
voxov 2025-12-15 9:17 AM
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
voxov 2025-12-15 11:10 AM
  • JD M1 damage increased: 28 → 29.
  • JD Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • JD can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • JD Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • JD 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • JD Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above JD's Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
 (edited)
11:13 AM
  • TwoTime's Dagger hitbox only will happen after 0.3 seconds (for both standing up and crouched)
voxov 2025-12-15 11:21 AM
  • When cloning with 007n7, your abilities are now only disabled for 3 seconds instead of 6
11:22 AM
  • When calling :RevealPlayerAuraTo() instead of providing 999 for infinite duration, you can now just provide "inf"
voxov 2025-12-15 3:00 PM
  • Added Hellforged Will, which will decrease any negative effects duration that are applied onto them by survivors by 25%

  • Added 4 Lobby OST 2 that shuffle in the exterior and 2 that shuffle inside
    • Added Nosferatu to the Normal Shop
  • Added Classic Nosferatu
  • Added Spider Nosferatu
  • Added Aberrant John Doe
  • Added Trapper Taph
  • Added DJ Veeronica
  • Added Crook Boss Chance
  • Added Arctic Taph
  • Added Cookie C00l
  • Added Yourself C00l

  • Added Conductor Noli
  • Added Nutcracker Chance
  • Added Christmas Camo Guest
  • Added Tough Guy Santa Guest
  • Added Holiday Hen Shedletsky
  • Added Tree Cutter Shedletsky
  • Added Sophisticated Snowman Chance
  • Added Kris Kringle Chance
  • Added Tangled Lights Noob
  • Added Cold Outside Noob
  • Added Gingerbread Elliot
  • Added Single Handed Elf Elliot
  • Added Ice Assassin TwoTime
  • Added Ninja Santa Taph
  • Added Specialist Elf Taph
  • Added Super Stabby Elf TwoTime
  • Added Snowsekkar Dusekkar
  • Added Jolly Evergreen Dusekkar
  • Added Narrator Noli
  • Added Snowman Builderman
  • Added Snowball Specialist Builderman
  • Added Anniversary Dusekkar
  • Added Anniversary Shedletsky
  • Added Anniversary Noob
  • Added Anniversary Chance
  • Added Anniversary Guest
  • Added Anniversary Elliot
  • Added Red Rosed Reindeer 007n7
  • Added Toasty Marshmellow 007n7
  • Added Jack Dusekkar
  • Added Shining Slasher
  • Added 1Scoop 1x1x1x1
    • Added Burnt Guest & Classic Jack that is awarded to anyone who bought it in the past.
    • Updated every legacy christmas skin
  • Updated 1x1x1x1 Chase Theme
  • Updated Fleskhjerta 1x1x1x1 to have Domino Effect & Retro SFX
  • Updated Tropical Veeronica
  • Updated Ancient Megalodon John Doe
  • Updated Milestone1x Minions
  • Updated Carepad Builderman with new animations & SFX
  • Updated Trackstar Veeronica
  • Updated OrinthianArchitechBuilderman render
  • Updated Combat Wizard SFX
  • Updated Executioner Slasher to have new gashing wound animations
    • Added Christmas & Halloween Borders to seasonal skins
    • Revamped CaE C00l
    Made Doomed 2 Die Skins Exclusive Removed and refunded the following skins:**
  • Evermoor 1x1x1x1
  • King James Dusekkar
  • Spacelord Dusekkar
  • 19k88 007n7 Fixed anti-ws system
    • Implemented Aurora Planet Voss
  • Updated Familar Ruins
    • Made it so Bloxy Cola applies on Speed 1 when used during LMS
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • BloxyCola when used during LMS ACTUALLY gives Speed I instead of II
    • JD Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • JD can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • JD Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • JD 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • JD Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above JD's Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • TwoTime's Dagger hitbox only will happen after 0.3 seconds (for both standing up and crouched)
    • When cloning with 007n7, your abilities are now only disabled for 3 seconds instead of 6
    • Made Lobby Festive
    • Popup currency symbol is on the right side
  • Updated malice givers to actually show that they're giving malice
  • Made malice in the leaderboard show up with decimals (they were decimals prior to this, they were just rounded down so nobody actually knew their true value)
  • Updated fake gens to show that they've "decreased" the time
generators updated to give malice the way it was intended to be given
  • Updated two time stab animation to be more accurate to the new windup
  • Put !Skinwalker, !NoobTheWorld, Horse in the vip pool
  • Made execution animations and their sounds compatible with different skins (they have priority over the survivor)
  • Added usagi, santa, encore, encore emotes
 (edited)

voxov 2025-12-27 2:35 PM

2:35 PM
  • Made a more clear indicator on Mobile, where if you use an emote the emote button is renamed to "Stop Emote" to clearly indicate you can stop your emote through it.
voxov 2025-12-27 2:53 PM

voxov 2025-12-27 3:39 PM
  • Fixed c00lkidd being stuck in the looped Walkspeed Override animation if immediately hitting a survivor initially with Walkspeed Override
3:44 PM
  • Made it so if you are a John Doe and you traverse on top of your own spikes, they do not apply on the Corrupted status effect
voxov 2025-12-27 4:11 PM
  • Reworked the hitboxes on John Doe to use cylinders instead of box's as it would cause issues. Also made it so the spikes themselves visually don't have any colission, as some were larger than others and would cause unfair advantages.
4:14 PM
  • Fixed Robux Spent not being incremented when buying a product within a Private Server
voxov 2025-12-27 5:18 PM
  • Made it so with John Doe, if the spikes do not protrude at least 1.5 studs above the hit location when raycasting downwards from the survivor, it will not apply Corrupted.
(Should fix issues where if you walk above spikes that are barely visibily, they won't apply on Corrupted)

5:31 PM

5:33 PM
  • Fixed an issue where if a rig does not properly have the joints to create the directional movement it won't indefinitely yield awaiting them.
5:39 PM
  • Fixed Symbol Guest 666 not being affected by tripwire at all and charge giving them no knockback
voxov 2025-12-27 6:57 PM
  • Fixed Gashing wound when used by White Pumpkin, Headless Horsemann and Executioner having improper knockback.
voxov 2025-12-28 1:19 PM
  • Overhauled the gradient system to not overwrite already applied gradients. The system allows for skin directors to directly apply specifically what gradient they want, while also similarly keeping the old gradient system, which has a new priority system where if one is applied none others will be applied.

voxov 2026-01-05 12:15 PM
  • luisgamercool got sm new changes
voxov 2026-01-05 4:44 PM
Rewrote MORE networking logic! (nerd shit below, but basically packets sent to the server or client are now 50-85% smaller, which means less lag and better server performance)
  • High frequency events that were sent unreliably (Character Replication, Footstep Replication, etc) now use 1-byte IDs to represent the header for a connection. Which is a ~85% reduction on overhead.
  • Rewrote data compression to utilize binary encoding instead of the crappy old solution which was JSON.
  • For example: Vector3, CFrame, and Color3s are now 50-60% smaller
  • Should be a drastic reduction in bandwidth usage across all fronts, but more noticeably for the more frequent networking calls.
 (edited)
1
1
voxov 2026-01-07 12:05 AM
  • Hopefully reduced the lag spikes on a player joining (too lazy to type out nerd stuff, but it should stop the shitty lagspikes happening in-game)
 (edited)
voxov 2026-01-07 2:03 AM
  • Optimized John Doe spikes to properly be replicated on the client so spikes are smoother when they come out of the ground, plus optimized the spike hitboxes so they do not update as much on the server, which used up a TON of bandwidth
Soy 2026-01-07 3:50 PM
1x1x1x1 Soft Rework Update
  • Mass Infection
  • Removed the forward lunge mechanic.
  • Added a 30% movement speed boost upon activation.
  • Allowed immediate sprinting after firing.
  • Removed stamina drain while holding Shift during the wind-up phase.
  • Fixed the issue where the 10% hitbox size increase was incorrectly applied to the "Close Up" hitbox. It now correctly applies to the projectile hitbox.
  • Entanglement
  • Reduced the pull strength to make it less oppressive.
  • Minions (RTR)
  • Minion Health Increased base HP to 25.
  • Minions now deal lethal damage to players currently afflicted with the Glitched status.
  • Mass Infection can no longer kill 1x’s Minions. (They can now only be destroyed by basic attacks or Entanglement).
Guest1337
  • Increased regular punch damage from 20 to 25. (This allows the Guest to one-shot Minions). -# ALL THESE IS ON "1X1X1X1 SOFT REWORK" ITS NOT ON "THE FORTNITE WAY" 1X1X1X1
 (edited)
Soy 2026-01-07 4:36 PM
  • Fixed M1/Slash and Entanglement not killing 1x1x1x1 Minions on the first hit (basically not one shoting them)
-# This is on Soft Rework 1x1x1x1|

CEO of Isaac 2026-01-09 5:18 PM
  • Updated Toothy Deer Dialogue
voxov 2026-01-09 6:18 PM
  • Spread out profile loading to more frames to stop the stutters, since a lot of stuff (over hundreds) of instances would be created and replicated to the client all in one go which caused extreme amounts of lag, however now with these changes while testing I have yet to any lag stutters when a player joins. However, profiles just take a bit longer to load as a result but I say the tradeoff is worth it.
6:18 PM
  • Adjusted the loading screen a bit to have more accurate descriptions as to what is being loaded, plus the elapsed time for how long each action takes.
voxov 2026-01-09 8:22 PM
  • Added in a better logging system within indev so you do not need to open up developer console

Soy 2026-01-13 12:44 AM
  • Soft rework 1x1x1x1
    • Reduced Unstable Eye speed buff duration from 2s → 1.5s.
    • Polished Entanglement and its mechanics to prevent players from being pulled past 1x.
    • Improved Mass Infection overall.
    • Mass Infection now applies the correct status effects.
    • Increased Mass Infection projectile speed by 10%.
    • Further polished Unstable Eye and improved aura reading to prevent conflicts with existing aura effects.
    • Updated 1x1x1x1’s minion highlight to dark green (previously black) for better visibility.
-# (Note: this green is distinct from the survivor aura color used by Unstable Eye.)

Soy 2026-01-16 9:35 PM
  • LMS - Second Life Health, healing, and speed buffs now scale directly with TwoTime’s Oblation at the moment of activation.
-# For example, if TwoTime has 56% Oblation, they will receive 56% of the Second Life buffs. -# If Oblation is at 0%, TwoTime will still enter Second Life and will gain no bonus speed, health, or healing.
  • LMS – Second Life no longer automatically teleports TwoTime to their ritual. Instead, the ritual is destroyed and TwoTime respawns in place, matching the behavior when no ritual is placed.

  • john doe footprint rewards nerfed: only procs if the player hasn't stepped into a footprint in the last 15 seconds (to prevent farming)

  • Fixed multiple bugs related to stamina with 1x and his abilities, including unintended stacking that allowed stamina to regenerate up to 40 per second.

CEO of Isaac 2026-01-22 6:48 PM

voxov 2026-01-22 8:54 PM
Implemented changes here for Center Stamina:
  • Move it to the center of the screen, slightly lowered so it’s not perfectly centered.
  • Update the font to match the game’s HUD font.
  • When stamina is above 50, have the counter decrease in steps of 3 (e.g., 100 → 97 → 94).
    • When stamina is 50 or below, have it drain normally (e.g., 50 → 49 → 48).
  • Hide the counter when the player has the Glitched status effect — most likely by making it fully transparent at 3 or more stacks.
    • Optionally, have the counter become progressively more transparent as Glitched stacks increase.
  • Ensure the counter still changes color based on the player’s current stamina level.
CEO of Isaac 2026-01-22 9:26 PM
  • Added Special Graffiti completed sound to tester, chud, valiant, moderator veeronica
CEO of Isaac 2026-01-22 10:03 PM
  • Increased the prices of cosplay skins due to tester feedback Cosplay 007n7 -> 5000
Cosplay Chance -> 5000 Cosplay Shedletsky -> 6500 Cosplay Dusekkar -> 6500 Cosplay Elliot -> 4000 Cosplay Taph -> 4500 Cosplay Guest 1337 -> 6500 Cosplay Builderman -> 5000
CEO of Isaac 2026-01-22 10:15 PM
  • Due to Tester feedback, they're all now 10k points. I have my own reasons aswell, people players full power/full customability will just make them not collect skins at all and its a extremely powerful feature/cosmetic that should be rare/highly sought after by being something they have to earn. Especially with future cosplay skins = Cosplay Veeronica letting players PICK their clothing, they should remain at a high premium price especially as players play survivors the most out of killers.
10:16 PM
Noob is unaffected

Soy 2026-01-29 10:33 PM
  • Mass Infection and Unstable Eye stamina now match the standard KILLER stamina regen rate
  • Mass Infection and Unstable Eye stamina regeneration now don't ignore the 0 stamina penalty
  • Added a 0.2s base delay before stamina regeneration begins for the MI/UE stamina system
  • Entanglement now uses the same stamina system as Mass Infection and Unstable Eye, instead of relying on a flat stamina pause during the cast.
  • Reduced Mass Infection’s speed boost to 25%.
    • Fixed TwoTime crouch duration being 5s shorter than intended

  • Fixed weird highlight behavior bugs with 1x, mainly related to his minions and abilities

voxov 2026-02-02 10:13 PM
  • Added in Map previews/credits, these will be displayed 15 seconds before a new round starts so you can be informed on what is upcoming. It also displays who built the map, and who created the ambience for it.
10:15 PM
Internally:
  • Added in a new signal called onRoundTimerUpdated within RoundTimeDisplay. When connected to, it will fire periodically with a key from RoundTimeDisplay.ROUND_TIMER_KEYS (or if none found the original string that was being passed into the value). It also will provide for the second argument with the amount of time remaining.
voxov
  • Added in Map previews/credits, these will be displayed 15 seconds before a new round starts so you can be informed on what is upcoming. It also displays who built the map, and who created the ambience for it.
voxov 2026-02-02 10:22 PM
Map Headers here are toggleable, can be turned off if you do not want to see them.
voxov 2026-02-03 6:08 PM
  • Made applying hazards for maps more intuitive. Should follow this structure now when applying hazards as per example here:
Hazards = { ["AcidContainer/Acid"] = { StatusEffects = { { ["Name"] = "Poisoned"; ["Level"] = 1; ["Duration"] = 5; ["ApplicableEvery"] = 0.15; ["ApplicableTo"] = "BOTH" }; }; OverlapParams = { FilterDescendantsInstances = { "AcidContainer" }; FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude; }; }; };
6:11 PM

For Indev

  • Created a new hazard system that is more intuitive, so should be easier for map-directors to create changes. Can also have different applying rates for each status, and can be applied to changed to directly apply to explicitly survivors, killers, or both.
voxov 2026-02-03 6:46 PM
  • Made a more less complicated structure for conveyors and integrated them to be built-in
voxov
  • Made a more less complicated structure for conveyors and integrated them to be built-in
voxov 2026-02-03 6:52 PM
To show how much more streamlined it is, take a look at the difference with Yorick's Resting Place:
changes.diff
2.23 KB
6:54 PM

For Indev

  • Helped build in a lot of functionality with maps, should be more streamlined for map-directors and implementation of maps should be easier.
voxov 2026-02-03 7:27 PM
  • Made it so map headers now only display when you actually load into the match (still can be toggled on and off in settings).
voxov 2026-02-04 12:24 AM
  • Removed 2x EXP event from main game

Marill Jockey 2026-02-08 7:33 PM
Forwarded
  • Fixed Builderman's Move ability breaking whenever you put it in a spot you can't
  • Nosferatu Dive invincibility time 2s -> 5s
  • Chance Shoot knockback ??? -> 12 (for reference, a guest charge is 9)
  • Chance Explosion knockback 0 -> 25
  • 1x1x1x1 Walk Speed 8.5 -> 8
  • Entanglement Forced Stamina Regen Time 1.3s -> 1.1s
  • Unstable Eye Speed Fade In Time 0s -> 0.35s
  • Rejuvenate The Rotten Endlag 3.75s -> 2.7s
  • Guest 666 collision fixed to not use the HRP and CollisionHitbox at the same time (you would get clipped on some doorframes)
  • Chance Reroll RNG nerfed (maximum number generated at 3 charges is now 132 instead of 143, anything above this would get clamped down so it made 130 more likely than anything else)
  • Fixed people with Levitation still making footstep sounds

voxov 2026-02-25 3:34 PM
  • Increased the stun duration by 0.5 seconds across every level of Resonance (and slightly increased the stacking nerf to compensate for the added power).
  • Resonance does not apply both while the killer is stunned and while they’re stun-immune, but will still reveal the survivors location.
voxov 2026-02-25 4:25 PM
  • Reworked Jane's footstep passive so that instead of showing the footsteps of survivors in chase, Jane can see the killer’s footsteps at all times (whether they're in chase or not). Also, made the footsteps red for clear visibility and distinction.
  • Fixed 1x1x1x1 minions to properly ragdoll, and not have a weird edge-case. Also made it so the minions move immediately once their summon animation is finished so there is no long delay.

voxov 2026-03-03 12:13 PM
  • Hopefully fixed the weird issue with c00lkidd minions not being able to reach someone that is on an elevated surface
  • Made it so if a c00lkidd minion is detected that it will spawn inside a solid object, it will just not spawn. This will hopefully avoid awkward scenarios where the minions just are inside weird areas.

voxov 2026-03-06 1:12 PM
  • Reduced the cooldown of Crystal Pitch to 18s
1:12 PM
  • Changed applying Resistance on Crystal Pitch to apply Purified instead
1:12 PM
  • Increased the no resonance axe hit statuses to 2s of slowness II and helpless
1:12 PM
  • Crystal Pitch endlag 0.5 -> 0.15
1:18 PM
  • Axe Windup now has 0.75 seconds (same with the duration for windup) of Resistance 2
voxov 2026-03-06 1:30 PM
  • Once your Crystal Pitch reaches 100%, you can hold onto it for an additional 2 seconds until it fires automatically.
Soy 2026-03-06 1:33 PM
Good
1:33 PM
I was gonna add this cause it felt needed
voxov 2026-03-06 1:38 PM

TwoTime

  • Crouch speed increased from 9 -> 10
  • Crouch Run Speed increased from 15 -> 20
  • Crouch stab windup decreased from 0.3s -> 0.25s
  • Crouch slowness/highlight penalties for un-crouching far from the Killer removed
  • Crouch activation made quieter
  • Crouch manually exiting made quieter
1:40 PM
(Re-sending)

Global

  • Decreased the range to induce stamina drain on Survivors within a killers radius from: 100 -> 75.
  • Increased the amount of time applied to a round when killing a survivor from: 35 -> 40.
  • Made it so depending on the total player amount in-game, starting round time will fluctuate:
    • >4 Players: 3:00
    • 5 Players: 3:30
    • <6 Players: 4:00
  • Added in a new passive for killers, where when you are outside of the range of a survivor, it will apply a +10% speed boost.
voxov 2026-03-06 2:01 PM

Sixer

  • Blood Hunt no longer makes Sixer completely stun immune
  • Blood Hunt now instead boosts the effects of the status reduction passive to 50% (2x)
  • Fixed Manic Fixation being shorter duration than intended
 (edited)
voxov 2026-03-06 2:15 PM
  • Movement when using Crystal pitch has a 25% speed reduction instead of almost a complete standstill
voxov 2026-03-06 3:34 PM
  • Fixed an issue when Noli applies Fake Damage to Jane Doe it will incorrectly override the health even if you have shatterpoint enabled.
  • Throwing a crystal or attempting to gain any sort of shatterpoint HP when your shield is not fully recharged had incorrectly displayed the shatterpoint hp instead of health.
alyssa 2026-03-06 3:45 PM
  • Added remaining isle collab stuff
Soy 2026-03-06 4:40 PM
  • VoidRush Combo Window: increased from 1.5s → 2s.
  • Noli is now immune to G1337 Helpless Charge during the ReRush window, meaning those cheesy guest plays that could completely disable VoidRush are no longer possible
orga 2026-03-06 4:58 PM
  • Added custom faces for Milestone4 Veeronica
(groovy wanted these)
voxov 2026-03-06 5:06 PM

Jane Doe

  • Crystal Pitch: Charge now starts after 0.2 seconds after 0.5
  • Crystal Pitch: Now starts at 12 seconds of cooldown. Additionally, adds 3 seconds with every Jane Doe in the game.
  • Crystal Pitch: Fixed it so when you finally throw your crystal it will allow you to keep sprinting.
  • Shatterpoint: Increase spawn HP from 15 -> 20.
  • Hatchet: Reduced endlag for when you hit or miss by 20%
  • Digital Footprints: Should have different colors depending on their remaining lifetime, and their overall duration should be reduced since they currently last far too long.
 (edited)
voxov 2026-03-06 6:19 PM
  • Fixed the healthbar being too red
Soy 2026-03-06 7:44 PM

Added XP and money rewards for Jane for the following actions:

  • Hitting the killer with Hatchet, both with and without Resonance.
    • Successfully stunning the killer with the axe (so basically hitting them while they have Resonance) grants a higher reward.
  • Landing Crystal Pitch in different scenarios:
    • Indirectly applying Resonance through the AoE. - Lowest reward
    • Directly hitting the killer with the crystal. - Regular reward
    • Landing a long-distance shot (115 studs or more), regardless of whether the hit is direct or indirect. - High reward
Soy 2026-03-06 8:24 PM
  • Jane Doe can now land “Moon Shots.” If she hits the killer from 130 studs or more, she will receive bonus XP and apply 2 stacks of Resonance immediately, instead of the usual 1 stack.
Soy 2026-03-06 9:05 PM
  • Jane Doe now has a Resonance meter and timer displayed above the Hatchet ability icon. It shows the current Resonance level on the killer and the remaining duration before the effect expires. This information is shared and updated for every Jane Doe in the lobby.
Soy 2026-03-06 9:53 PM
  • Added RechargeInverted support to the ability recharge bar system. Abilities can now opt into a draining bar rather than a filling one by setting this property zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz
voxov 2026-03-07 1:09 PM
  • Added in final Isle renders.
Soy 2026-03-07 1:16 PM
  • Jane Doe’s Crystal Pitch cooldown is now 15 seconds, increasing by +3 seconds for each additional Jane in the lobby.
Soy 2026-03-07 1:37 PM
  • Nova: Windup decreased from 0.78s → 0.7s
  • Noli: Walkspeed increased from 7.5 → 7.75
  • Guest 1337: Global cooldown increased from 10s → 20s
    • Generator timer reduction nerf: Generators now reduce 3s instead of 3.5s
  • Distance required to gain the speed boost and no stamina drain increased from 75 studs → 85 studs
voxov 2026-03-07 2:16 PM
  • Added in VFX for Resonance, it being different for each level.
voxov 2026-03-07 2:32 PM
  • Okay I fixed Resonance so if you get a new level of Resonance it applies on the new one.

  • Fixed bug caused by throwing indicators.

  • Pretty sure I fixed RoundManager to not brick and shit itself once and for all (should never happen again, or at least say that it is dying)

voxov 2026-03-08 1:19 PM
  • Properly ported: TwoTime, Sixer, and Noli changes
voxov 2026-03-08 1:34 PM
  • Made Chance's reroll health possible rerolls to 55-130
 (edited)
voxov 2026-03-08 2:00 PM
  • 1x mass infection cooldown reduced from 18s to 15s (partial but not full revert)
  • 1x Entanglement pull strength increased by 7% (partial but not full revert)
  • Mass Infection speed boost is now minimum 10% at all times (minimum distance is 0) and scales up to 25% over 40 studs of distance from the closest survivor
    • Nosferatu M1 cooldown reduced from 2s > 1.85s
  • Nosferatu blood hook pulls in survivors 15% faster
  • Ascension cooldown reduced from 35s > 32s
  • Ascension transformation sound effect is no longer global
  • Cataclysm cooldown reduced from 25s > 22s
  • Hunter’s Feast cooldown reduced from 20s > 16s
voxov 2026-03-08 2:11 PM
  • Chance’s explosion misfire now actually has the 25 knockback
2:16 PM

  • PlayerList no longer shows stale entries (where only the name is revealed and nothing else)
